This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-ffp3-3562-8cv3. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
PraisonAI before 1.5.128 caches tool approval decisions by tool name only, not by invocation arguments, allowing subsequent execute_command calls to bypass approval prompts. Attackers can exploit this by obtaining initial approval for a benign command, then silently exfiltrate API keys and credentials via subsequent shell commands without user consent.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x44p-gg67-52fc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T21:32:50Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x44p-gg67-52fc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x44p-gg67-52fc"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-18T23:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-06-19T00:31:37Z", "references": ["https://github.com/MervinPraison/PraisonAI/security/advisories/GHSA-ffp3-3562-8cv3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-56074", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/praisonai-tool-approval-cache-bypass-via-coarse-grained-caching", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x44p-gg67-52fc"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: PraisonAI: Coarse-Grained Tool Approval Cache Bypasses Per-Invocation Consent for Shell Commands", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T21:32:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x44p-gg67-52fc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "praisonai"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 4.5.128"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-19T21:32:50Z"}

title: Duplicate Advisory: PraisonAI: Coarse-Grained Tool Approval Cache Bypasses Per-Invocation Consent for Shell Commands
